items.title: IBM (IBM) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
items.description: IBM (IBM) reached $271.37 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a +1.87% change compared to its last close.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Nvidia Pops; EV Play Skids On Warren Buffett Move (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index rose on the stock market today amid more Fedspeak. Apple and Tesla popped. Nvidia jumped on a big OpenAI investment.

items.title: Steve Jobs’ intern went on to sell his company to Google for $625 million—he now advises grads to pay to work for impressive people
items.description: Chet Kapoor believes paying to work for your role model is better value for those who are already spending thousands of dollars on a degree.

items.title: Former Trump economic adviser Gary Cohn says tariffs are the reason you’re having a hard time finding a job
items.description: Cohn said companies pivoted from job hoarding to aggressive cost cutting.

items.title: Seagate Stock Surges 153.4% in 6 Months: Will the Uptrend Continue?
items.description: STX has surged 153.4% in six months, lifted by AI-driven cloud demand, HAMR ramp-up, SSD growth and new product launches.
